item.title: Contact Form Style 1
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]
1 Contact Form Style 1 [contact-name] youremail@yourdomain.com
Contact Form Style 1 Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]> 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. The field is required. The field is too long. The field is too short. The date format is incorrect. The date is before the earliest one allowed. The date is after the latest one allowed. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The file is too big. There was an error uploading the file. The number format is invalid. The number is smaller than the minimum allowed. The number is larger than the maximum allowed. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Your entered code is incorrect. The e-mail address entered is invalid. The URL is invalid. The telephone number is invalid.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: [text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:1;s:7:"subject";s:20:"Contact Form Style 1";s:6:"sender";s:41:"[contact-name] ";s:9:"recipient";s:24:"youremail@yourdomain.com";s:4:"body";s:2814:"
Contact Form Style 1 Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
";s:18:"additional_headers";s:42:"Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]>";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:1;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:0;s:7:"subject";s:0:"";s:6:"sender";s:0:"";s:9:"recipient";s:0:"";s:4:"body";s:0:"";s:18:"additional_headers";s:0:"";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:23:{s:12:"mail_sent_ok";s:45:"Thank you for your message. It has been sent.";s:12:"mail_sent_ng";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:16:"validation_error";s:61:"One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again.";s:4:"spam";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:22:"The field is required.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:22:"The field is too long.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:23:"The field is too short.";s:12:"invalid_date";s:29:"The date format is incorrect.";s:14:"date_too_early";s:44:"The date is before the earliest one allowed.";s:13:"date_too_late";s:41:"The date is after the latest one allowed.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:20:"The file is too big.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";s:14:"invalid_number";s:29:"The number format is invalid.";s:16:"number_too_small";s:47:"The number is smaller than the minimum allowed.";s:16:"number_too_large";s:46:"The number is larger than the maximum allowed.";s:23:"quiz_answer_not_correct";s:36:"The answer to the quiz is incorrect.";s:17:"captcha_not_match";s:31:"Your entered code is incorrect.";s:13:"invalid_email";s:38:"The e-mail address entered is invalid.";s:11:"invalid_url";s:19:"The URL is invalid.";s:11:"invalid_tel";s:32:"The telephone number is invalid.";}
en_US

item.title: Contact Form Style 2
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:btn-white class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]
1 Contact Form Style 2 [contact-name] youremail@yourdomain.com
Contact Form Style 2 Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]> 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. The field is required. The field is too long. The field is too short. The date format is incorrect. The date is before the earliest one allowed. The date is after the latest one allowed. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The file is too big. There was an error uploading the file. The number format is invalid. The number is smaller than the minimum allowed. The number is larger than the maximum allowed. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Your entered code is incorrect. The e-mail address entered is invalid. The URL is invalid. The telephone number is invalid.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: [text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:btn-white class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]

Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:22:"The field is required.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:22:"The field is too long.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:23:"The field is too short.";s:12:"invalid_date";s:29:"The date format is incorrect.";s:14:"date_too_early";s:44:"The date is before the earliest one allowed.";s:13:"date_too_late";s:41:"The date is after the latest one allowed.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:20:"The file is too big.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";s:14:"invalid_number";s:29:"The number format is invalid.";s:16:"number_too_small";s:47:"The number is smaller than the minimum allowed.";s:16:"number_too_large";s:46:"The number is larger than the maximum allowed.";s:23:"quiz_answer_not_correct";s:36:"The answer to the quiz is incorrect.";s:17:"captcha_not_match";s:31:"Your entered code is incorrect.";s:13:"invalid_email";s:38:"The e-mail address entered is invalid.";s:11:"invalid_url";s:19:"The URL is invalid.";s:11:"invalid_tel";s:32:"The telephone number is invalid.";}

item.title: Contact Form Style 3
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name *"]
[text contact-phone placeholder "Phone"]
[email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail *"]
[text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"]
[textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Describe your project"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-medium class:btn-round class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]
1 Contact Form Style 3 [contact-name] youremail@yourdomain.com
Contact Form Style 3 Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]> 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. The field is required. The field is too long. The field is too short. The date format is incorrect. The date is before the earliest one allowed. The date is after the latest one allowed. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The file is too big. There was an error uploading the file. The number format is invalid. The number is smaller than the minimum allowed. The number is larger than the maximum allowed. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Your entered code is incorrect. The e-mail address entered is invalid. The URL is invalid. The telephone number is invalid.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name *"]
[text contact-phone placeholder "Phone"]
[email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail *"]
[text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"]
[textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Describe your project"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-medium class:btn-round class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]

item.title: Contact Form Style 4
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name *"]
[text contact-phone placeholder "Phone"]
[email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail *"]
[text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"]
[textarea contact-message x6 placeholder "Describe your project"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-medium class:btn-round class:btn-white class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]
1 Contact Form Style 4 [contact-name] youremail@yourdomain.com
Contact Form Style 4 Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]> 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. The field is required. The field is too long. The field is too short. The date format is incorrect. The date is before the earliest one allowed. The date is after the latest one allowed. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The file is too big. There was an error uploading the file. The number format is invalid. The number is smaller than the minimum allowed. The number is larger than the maximum allowed. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Your entered code is incorrect. The e-mail address entered is invalid. The URL is invalid. The telephone number is invalid.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[text* contact-name placeholder "Name *"]
[text contact-phone placeholder "Phone"]
[email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail *"]
[text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"]
[textarea contact-message x6 placeholder "Describe your project"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-medium class:btn-round class:btn-white class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]

item.title: Contact form popup
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded:
Looking for a excellent business idea?

[text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:btn-black class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]
1 Contact form popup [contact-name] youremail@yourdomain.com
Contact Us Popup Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]> 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. The field is required. The field is too long. The field is too short. The date format is incorrect. The date is before the earliest one allowed. The date is after the latest one allowed. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The file is too big. There was an error uploading the file. The number format is invalid. The number is smaller than the minimum allowed. The number is larger than the maximum allowed. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Your entered code is incorrect. The e-mail address entered is invalid. The URL is invalid. The telephone number is invalid.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Looking for a excellent business idea?

[text* contact-name placeholder "Name*"] [email* contact-email placeholder "E-mail*"] [text contact-subject placeholder "Subject"] [textarea contact-message x3 placeholder "Your Message"] [submit class:btn class:btn-small class:btn-black class:alt-font "SEND MESSAGE"]

Contact Us Popup Details
Name: [contact-name]
Email: [contact-email]
Subject: [contact-subject]
Message: [contact-message]
IP Address: [_remote_ip]
URL: [_post_url]
";s:18:"additional_headers";s:42:"Reply-To: [contact-name] <[contact-email]>";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:1;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}
